# Little Wise Kids

> Quality childcare and bilingual early years education in Easton, Bristol.

## Core Pages & Resources
- [About Us](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/about-us): Learn about our ethos, team, and approach to childcare.
- [Parents Information](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/parents-information): Details on settling in, policies, and what children need.
- [Hours & Nutrition](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/hours-nutrition): Operating hours, daily routines, and healthy meal options.
- [Multilingual Learning](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/multilingual-learning): Information on our English & Portuguese language learning programs.
- [Our Gallery](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/our-gallery): Photo gallery of our indoor and outdoor facilities.
- [Contact Us](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/contact): Get in touch to schedule a visit or ask questions.

## Agent Resources & API Discovery
- [API Catalog](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/.well-known/api-catalog): Automated API discovery catalog.
- [MCP Server Card](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Model Context Protocol server configuration.
- [Agent Skills](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Index of supported agent skills.
- [Agent Auth Info](https://little-wise-kids.raspy-snowflake-9303.workers.dev/auth.md): Authentication and registration guidelines.
